docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLOAN KING-HODGE AS TO DEFENDANT BEVERLY HEALTH AND REHABILITATION SERVICES, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLOAN KING-HODGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEVERLY HEALTH AND REHABILITATION SERVICES, INC. $282.31 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $362.31
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BEVERLY HEALTH AND REHABILITATION SERVICES, INC.
REIMBURSEMENT RE-6103.5 GC. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF SLOAN KING-HODGE
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLOAN KING-HODGE AS TO DEFENDANT BEVERLY HEALTH AND REHABILITATION SERVICES, INC.
